ReviewRecord.title: Review Record
ReviewRecord.description: A single review entry for a subject unit

SubjectProgress.title: Subject Progress
SubjectProgress.description: Review history for a specific subject unit

VocabProgress.title: Vocabulary Progress
VocabProgress.description: Progress tracking for a specific vocabulary item

VocabCache.title: Vocabulary AI Cache
VocabCache.description: Cached AI explanation for a vocabulary item

UserUsage.title: User AI Usage
UserUsage.description: Daily AI usage count for a user

UnitMetadata.title: Unit Metadata
UnitMetadata.description: Metadata for a subject unit, like PDF notes

aiNoteUrl.description: URL to the AI generated note in Storage

manualNoteUrl.description: URL to the manual handwritten note in Storage

/unit_metadata/{unitId}.description: Global metadata for subject units, like PDF links

/users/{userId}/subjectProgress/{unitId}.description: Stores review history for each subject unit per user

/users/{userId}/vocabProgress/{vocabId}.description: Stores review count for each vocabulary item per user

/vocab_cache/{word}.description: Global cache for AI vocabulary explanations

/users/{userId}/usage/{date}.description: Daily AI usage tracking for each user
